title: 10 best herbal teas for eye strain
description: Dame's Jet Teas helps with eye strain because its unique blend of herbs works to calm and soothe tired eyes. The antioxidants and flavonoids present in the tea help to reduce inflammation and relax the ocular muscles, providing instant relief from dryness and fatigue. Additionally, the herbal ingredients promote healthy blood flow to the eyes, which can help to improve vision clarity and reduce eye strain caused by prolonged screen time or reading....
